name: The Architect
description: Mastering the logic behind the beauty. The Architect ensures that every artisan's portfolio is securely managed and every transaction flows seamlessly through our Native PHP foundation.

name: The Designer
description: Guardian of the visual soul. The Designer weaves the digital tapestry of Fannen.tn, ensuring the interface honors the profound beauty of Maghrebian craftsmanship.

name: The Integrator
description: Wizard of interaction. The Integrator breathes life into static designs, connecting the rigid logic of the backend to the fluid experience of the frontend with pure code.
